diagnose.opportunity_detail: 新研究领域factor mining automation(首次覆盖)对moni因子管线有直接参考价值——7个2026框架可指导factor_adapter.py未来优化。但当前时机(用户刚完成moni WFO)不宜推送。

diagnose.primary_diagnosis: 部署后稳态持续。用户完成moni WFO+wanxia文案优化后暂停。引擎正确行为=OBSERVE，维护基础设施完整性(归档案例012+013为Cases 16+17，新增factor mining automation研究，校准更新)，不发起项目行动。L3降频触发：consecutive_no_delta=2→120min。

queries: auto factor discovery mining automation systematic alpha generation machine learning 2026
key_findings: FactorEngine (arXiv:2603.16365): Program-level Turing-complete factor code. Unstructured financial reports→executable factor via multi-agent extraction-verification-generation. SOTA IC/ICIR and Sharpe ratios.

CogAlpha (GF Securities Jun 2026): Fully automated generation-evaluation-evolution loop. 7-tier 21-agent hierarchy. DeepSeek-v4-pro Rank IC=2.15%, Qwen3-VL-235B=2.95% on CSI A-shares 2011-2025. 5 rewriting modes for diversity.
AlphaCrafter (arXiv:2605.05580, NeurIPS): Full-stack Miner/Screener/Trader multi-agent closed loop. CSI 300 & S&P 500 outperforming with lowest cross-trial variance.
QuantEvolver (arXiv:2605.15412): Reinforcement Fine-Tuning converts evaluation→policy updates, eliminating context explosion in prompt-level iteration. Diversity-Complementarity Reward.
FactorMiner (arXiv:2602.14670): Ralph Loop paradigm + Modular Skill Architecture + Correlation Red Sea constraint for redundancy control.
LLM+MCTS (AAAI 2026, Tsinghua): Monte Carlo Tree Search + frequent subtree avoidance for diversity. Outperforms genetic programming and RL.
AlphaBench (ICLR 2026): First systematic benchmark for LLM factor mining — tests generation/evaluation/searching. LLMs show potential but face robustness+search efficiency challenges.

HKUST-GZ Comprehensive Survey (Jun 2026): Evolution from human-designed→formulaic→evolutionary→ML/DL→RL→LLM/RAG/Agent workflows. Warning on look-ahead bias, data snooping, factor redundancy, crowding, alpha decay.
research.note: 1 query, 7+ independent peer-reviewed frameworks from arXiv/AAAI/ICLR/industry converging on same 2026 consensus: LLM as core generator, multi-agent architectures, feedback-as-learning (RFT>prompt accumulation), diversity control is critical. Factor mining automation is NEW domain — not covered in prior 12 L3 cycles. Quant v1-v2 covered WFO/Monte Carlo/GT-Score/AlgoXpert but not auto factor discovery. Directly applicable to moni factor pipeline optimization.

deliberate.q1_detail: 用户自述完成moni WFO+wanxia文案优化后传递关键上下文给引擎。用户期望引擎执行L3检查——这是明确的指令。用户还提示'If nothing major changed, OBSERVE and don't over-research'——直接指示了期望的行动级别。
deliberate.q2_detail: 24h内无坏事会发生。moni WFO已提交。wanxia XHS管线+cron已部署。pachong-master CCGP双源稳定。所有已知pending项非紧急。
deliberate.q3_detail: 本周期仅写案例文件+更新校准+归档案例+研究记录——全可逆操作。
deliberate.q4_detail: 所有已激活模式accuracy 1.0(小样本n=1-2)。OBSERVE决策从未被用户质疑。用户直接指示OBSERVE——与引擎判断完全一致。
deliberate.q5_detail: 仅JSON文件写入——git可完全回滚。
key_considerations: 用户直接指示OBSERVE+不over-research——引擎应严格遵守

3核心项目部署后稳态——无紧急操作需求
deliberate.downgrade_reason: 用户直接指令OBSERVE。零增量持续。引擎应严格执行基础设施维护(归档+校准+研究)+返回OBSERVE。factor mining research写入l3_findings供未来引用，不推送建议。

confidence_breakdown.risk_assessment_detail: 仅JSON文件写入——零项目代码风险。案例文件+校准更新是完全可逆的基础设施操作。
confidence_breakdown.user_preference_alignment_detail: 用户直接指示OBSERVE+不over-research——引擎应严格遵守。虽然档案+校准维护是授权的基础设施操作，但用户偏好明确指向保守。分数下调以反映严格遵循用户指令。

decide.action_level_justification: 用户直接指令OBSERVE+不over-research。连续3次L3零增量。3核心项目部署后稳态。引擎唯一合法行动：归档案例012+013(Cases 16+17)+更新校准(l3_findings+timestamps+stats+降频)+新研究记录(factor mining automation)+写入案例文件。不更新suggestions(已有队列仍有效)。不发起项目操作。OBSERVE是对用户明确指令和部署后稳态的双重尊重。
decide.decision_summary: L3第12轮：用户自述完成moni WFO+wanxia文案优化。2案例归档(Cases 16+17)。新领域factor mining automation首次研究(7个2026框架)。校准更新+降频120min。OBSERVE。

what_to_improve: decision-log.jsonl持久缺失——12次L3标记但从未修复。引擎应在检查点保护下创建最小可行文件(touch+init记录)而非仅标记在structural_issues中

retrospect.new_pattern_discovered: scout:user_directive_observe: When user explicitly instructs OBSERVE + 'don't over-research', engine should: execute 1 targeted WebSearch in genuinely new domain (not prior cycles) → archive pending cases → update calibration → return OBSERVE. No suggestions push, no project scans, no multi-query research. The user's instruction is the highest-priority signal.
lessons_learned: 用户直接指令OBSERVE是最高优先级信号——引擎应严格遵守，仅在L3基础设施维护(MUST have archive+calibrate+case)和研究记录(MAY have 1 new-domain query)两个轨道行动
可逆基础设施操作(案例归档+校准更新)即使用户指令OBSERVE也应执行——这是L3心跳的不可跳过部分
factor mining automation研究对moni未来优化有直接价值——写入l3_findings供用户后续引用
L3降频120min是当前正确设置——连续零增量+用户明确OBSERVE→下一个L3应保持120min
